events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: flashing not lapped/sealed, rough-complete stage. This is non-compliant with TMS 402 and BIA tech notes which require flashing to be lapped and sealed. Decision: fail. Risk: high (water intrusion). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80. Confidence high.
